project.name: Frappe PIM - Enterprise Product Information Management
project.description: SAP MDG'yi geride bırakan, universal, industry-agnostic PIM sistemi. Akeneo'nun family variant modeli, Stibo STEP'in classification inheritance'ı, Informatica MDM'in golden record survivorship'ı ve Salsify'ın channel-first yaklaşımını birleştiren enterprise-grade çözüm.
project.author: Ismail

architecture.philosophy: Write less, do more - Minimal code, maximum functionality
patterns: Akeneo Family Variant Model - Product structure with configurable variant axes
Stibo STEP Classification Inheritance - Multi-taxonomy support
Informatica MDM XREF Pattern - Data lineage and survivorship
Salsify Channel Readiness - Commerce activation scoring
Pimcore Object Brick Pattern - Dynamic category-specific attributes
inRiver Link Entity Pattern - Rich relationship metadata
core_principles: API-first design with REST and GraphQL-like endpoints
Event-driven core with event sourcing for audit trails

frappe_integration.erpnext: Bidirectional sync with Item, BOM, Supplier, Customer
frappe_integration.builder: Custom page builder for product catalogs

roles.name: PIM Manager
roles.description: Full PIM access including settings and configuration

roles.name: PIM Editor
roles.description: Create and edit products, manage content

roles.name: Data Steward
roles.description: Data quality management, golden record validation

coding_standards.javascript: ES6+, no jQuery in new code
coding_standards.naming: snake_case for Python, camelCase for JS

priority_order: 1. Core DocTypes: Product Master, Product Variant, Product Type, Product Family
2. Attributes System: Attribute, Attribute Group, Product Attribute Value
3. Classification: Product Category, Taxonomy, Taxonomy Node
5. Data Quality: Golden Record, Survivorship Rule, Duplicate Detection
7. DAM: Digital Asset, Renditions, Product Asset Link
9. Supplier Portal: Portal User, Submission, Quality Score
10. AI: Enrichment Job, Prompt Template, Approval Queue
key_implementation_notes: Her DocType için controller (Python) ve client script (JS) oluştur
Translatable alanlar için translatable property kullan
Tree structure için nsm (Nested Set Model) kullan
ERPNext Link alanları için depends_on ile PIM Settings kontrolü yap
Event sourcing için her değişiklikte PIM Event oluştur
Completeness hesaplaması cache'lenmeli ve incremental güncellenmeli
AI işlemleri background job olarak çalışmalı
Webhook gönderimi retry pattern ile olmalı
API rate limiting için frappe.rate_limiter kullan
mevcut_doctypelari_koru: Mevcut Golden Record DocType'ını bu prompt ile uyumlu hale getir
Mevcut Product Family'yi Family Variant ile entegre et
Data Steward role'ünü koru ve genişlet
